problem id: e568d07b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) OR SHL(5)

examples:
  10111000 -> 10001011
  11011100 -> 11001101
  10001010 -> 11101000
  01111000 -> 10000111
  00011100 -> 11000001
  01111011 -> 11110111
  00001010 -> 11100000
  11111001 -> 10111111
  11010100 -> 11001101
  10101111 -> 11111010

query: 00010101
predicted answer: 11110001
